targets.rawSql: SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(rate_date) as time_sec, CAST(rate AS DECIMAL(10, 4)) as value, 'USD' as metric FROM global_exchange_rates WHERE currency_code = 'USD' ORDER BY rate_date ASC
SELECT CAST(rate AS DECIMAL(10, 4)) as rate FROM global_exchange_rates WHERE currency_code = 'USD' ORDER BY rate_date DESC LIMIT 1
